title: Design Engineer (Electrical)
description:
KEY DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Assist in preparing electrical design drawings and layouts (e.g. power distribution, lighting, earthing).
  • Support senior engineers in developing electrical design calculations and technical documentation.
  • Coordinate with internal teams (mechanical, architectural, civil) to support design integration.
  • Assist with design reviews, updates, and revisions based on project requirements.
  • Support preparation of authority submissions and responses to technical queries.
  • Review and track drawings, technical documents, and submissions.
  • Provide basic technical support during construction and commissioning stages.
  • Attend project meetings and site visits when required.

JOB REQUIREMENTS

  • Diploma or Degree in Electrical Engineering or related field.
  • Fresh graduates are welcome (no prior experience required).
  • Basic knowledge of electrical systems for buildings (power, lighting, earthing).
  • Familiarity with AutoCAD (Revit/BIM is a plus but not required).
  • Willingness to learn and work in a fast-paced project environment.
  • Good communication and teamwork skills.

postedCompany.description:
ENGIE group is a global reference in low-carbon energy and services. Our purpose is to act to accelerate the transition towards a carbon-neutral world, through reduced energy consumption and more environmentally friendly solutions, reconciling economic performance with a positive impact on people and the planet.


ENGIE RCS is one of the entities under ENGIE South East Asia, a cluster with a fast-growing team of over 2,000 employees with presence in Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand and the Philippines to provide tailor-made integrated solutions for our customers in commercial buildings, industries, and cities.

Using globally leading technologies, we create innovative energy and smart solutions that enhance the performance of home, business, community, and make the world a better place. We act throughout the value chain: strategy, design, engineering, energy-efficient asset construction, digital platforms, operations management, financing syndication and outcome assurance.

A leading construction and engineering company, ENGIE RCS provides a full range of integrated cutting-edge and cost-effective design and construction services including engineering, designing, infrastructure, and installation for commercial, residential and purpose-build industrial buildings such as Data Centres and Offshore E&I.


Our professional team of design and build expertise with deep project management experience, and advanced virtual design and construction (VDC) technology capabilities serve to provide site feasibility studies, Data Centre space planning, building & infrastructure design, and full suite of technical, mechanical, and electrical services. We aim to deliver value-added, smart, reliable, green & energy efficient, quality, and cost-effective solutions that support the successful business and sustainability objectives of our customers.
postedCompany.name: ENGIE RCS PTE. LTD.
